__fixture__.name: entry_sheet_add_root_to_active_workspace
__fixture__.scenario: Paired with entry_row_add_root_workspace_switcher.json. Add a new local root to the active workspace. The sheet emits with open_flow_sheet_class = add_root_to_active_workspace, sheet_surface_class = window_attached_sheet. policy_restrictions names authority_delta = none for the active workspace and trust_review_required for the new root. result_mode resolves to workspace_with_roots. trust_posture_class = trust_per_root_admission. profile_default_class = unchanged. Demonstrates §5.1 add_root_to_active_workspace, §5.2 axes (no destination write since add_root just widens the active workspace), §5.3 invariants 2, 4 (per-root trust evaluation, no profile retarget).

target_type_disclosure.summary: Local folder. Will widen the active workspace as a new root.

policy_restrictions_disclosure.summary: Active-workspace authority is unchanged. The new root is admitted under its own trust evaluation.

result_mode_disclosure.summary: Active workspace widens to include the new root.

trust_posture_disclosure.summary: Each root re-evaluates trust independently of the active workspace.

fallback_disclosure.summary: Cancel preserves the active workspace boundary. Restricted continuation keeps the new root admitted-but-restricted if trust narrows.

presentation_subtitle: Active workspace authority unchanged. New root admitted under its own trust evaluation.
